main.name: Satendra Kumar
main.description: Senior Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of experience specializing in high-performance BI tools, algorithmic trading systems, and enterprise mobile applications. Expert in React, Python (Flask), and distributed systems.
main.bio: I am a Senior Software Engineer focused on architecting and scaling complex data-driven applications. From optimizing grid calculations to achieve a 96% latency reduction to building automated trading engines, I thrive on solving high-impact technical challenges.

education.school: Impact College of Engineering and Applied Sciences (ICEAS)

work.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
work.description: Lead developer for enterprise BI solutions and high-performance system architecture.
highlights: Optimized Luckysheet core calculation engine, reducing report generation latency by 96% (from 40 minutes to 90 seconds).
Engineered a comprehensive automated options trading engine using Python, Flask, Celery, and Redis, integrating with kite-connect API.
Directed the end-to-end customization of Apache Superset for enterprise-grade dashboards and secure data visualization.
Architected scalable microservices and designed complex frontend components using React and Next.js.
Lead cross-functional teams of developers to ship high-impact features for global BI clients.

work.title: Senior Technical Support Engineer (Network/Security)
work.description: Technical leadership in enterprise network infrastructure and security operations.
highlights: Managed and optimized critical data and voice circuits for Fortune 500 enterprise clients.
Provisioned and troubleshot complex network security protocols and enterprise-grade connectivity.
Ensured 99.9% uptime for business-critical voice circuits through proactive monitoring and rapid incident response.
Collaborated with global engineering teams to resolve tier-3 technical escalations.

projects.title: Automated Options Trading Platform
projects.description: A high-precision trading engine built with Python, Flask, kite-connect API, Celery, and Redis for automated options trading.

projects.title: 96% Latency Optimization (Luckysheet)
projects.description: Refactored core calculation engines to reduce BI report latency from 40 minutes to under 90 seconds.

projects.title: Enterprise Business Mobile App
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile application for enterprise resource management built with Expo and React Native.

projects.title: Custom Apache Superset Integration
projects.description: Enterprise-level BI dashboard customization and security integration with Superset.
